old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.49.2","title":"Poison failed EDHOC sessions","description":"EDHOC processing errors after DH retain PRKs and retryable state; create_message_1 can reuse invalid/zeroized ephemeral state; injected RNG constructors use infallible fill_bytes and may panic on hardware entropy failure. Make failures immediately zeroize and permanently poison the session, guard all lifecycle methods, and use fallible entropy APIs.","acceptance_criteria":"Every post-DH parser/authentication error zeroizes stored/transient secrets and prevents retry/export; create_message_1 rejects completed/failed/zeroized state; try_fill_bytes entropy failure returns an explicit error without panic or partial object; host/Cortex-M tests and three reviews pass.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-18T00:02:32.548164Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T00:02:32.548164Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.49.2","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.49","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-18T00:02:32.678117Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Implemented fail-closed lifecycle poisoning, fallible injected entropy, immediate raw/stored secret wiping, and state guards; host and Cortex-M checks plus three exact reviews pass.
